title: Memoize parse_time Results in schedule.lua

last_review.summary: The implementation correctly fulfills all task requirements. The memoization feature is well-designed with proper handling of edge cases.
suggestions: Proof that `string.match` is not called on cache hits (monkey-patch verification)

summary: Fixed parse_time memoization in schedule.lua with proper nil caching using sentinel value and O(1) cache size tracking. Addresses all issues from previous review: (1) Fixed Lua ternary pitfall where 'a and nil or c' fails because nil is falsy, (2) Replaced O(n) pairs() counting with _cache_size counter, (3) Added tests that monkey-patch string.match to prove caching actually works. All 91 tests pass (23 schedule tests including 4 new cache tests).
